Description: Summon your Great White Tsuchinoko minion. Delightfully squidgy, and a veritable fountain of good fortune to boot.
Description{Enhanced}: Initially thought to be a mere ornament, the hebi bugyo was just as surprised as you were when this squat, snakelike creature began to move of its own accord. Revered in the Far East as a serpentine bringer of luck, it must have wriggled onboard a ship bound for the shores of Limsa Lominsa.
SpecialAction{Description}: Grants 10 action points to all allies within range who do not have similar actions.

Description: Summon your wisp of Darkness minion. What it cannot smother, it nibbles. What it cannot nibble, it tickles.
Description{Enhanced}: In the course of recalling your ferocious battle with the Cloud of Darkness, this curious mammet somehow came to be in your possession. While its design is highly reminiscent of the works of the notorious goldsmith who crafted the wind-up succubus, there is no way to ascertain the truth of its origin.
Tooltip:
I can't begin to imagine how
powerful it must have been.
   - Ryne
SpecialAction{Description}: Delivers 5% damage to the nearest enemy Arcana Stone.
